tasks.label: Free 5173 and Start Frontend
args: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Set-Location frontend; npm run dev -- --host --strictPort --port 5173

tasks.label: Check Duplicate Expense References
Recheck Two Expense Refs
